title: Update preact to version 7.0.0 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [preact](https://www.npmjs.com/package/preact) just published its new version 7.0.0.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency preact
New version 7.0.0
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of preact. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 26 commits . - [`8ca662c`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/8ca662cd78815209d179cbcb3e22ac027e02df22) 7.0.0 beta - [`a462aef`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/a462aefbba8f4544c4ec088fe221a2789f285fe0) [temp] revert unmount optimizations for beta - [`ddf2919`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/ddf291979ca4f5d5d361eb8ed241b16ba0d8ef8a) Tiny size reduction - [`d78d0e6`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/d78d0e6b17d550914b3749de88ad9d21b3d2fb7a) Possibly Breaking Change: Preact will now ignore elements it didn't create, unless hydrating (ie, rendering from top-level `render()` call). - [`fe29adc`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/fe29adc3e4ba17e960f644c40bfe9b99572b28f7) Fix lint warnings in tests. - [`831da2d`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/831da2d342ea7dc3b2648a18843866e5064e1b1d) massive performance improvement for unmounting components! 🎉 - [`e9fc3c2`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/e9fc3c216c0da0b0fdd86e6998c8f5d00b90f890) Fix CI build (#386) - [`70a5ca3`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/70a5ca367d95ab9bfb96b1cd270aa0d4ab6df173) This adds a link to preact-i18nline. (#382) - [`5dffd85`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/5dffd852026f3644f4d459016c9243421efbf159) Merge branch 'pr-fix-build-for-windows' of https://github.com/Download/preact - [`f14edf7`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/f14edf797e47c762424a223738886a7e469399b2) kilobits => kilobytes (#383) - [`c193547`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/c193547db231362e15033b83dae1a15cf678a766) Test for #292 - [`284e4aa`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/284e4aa3e7bed8e4e7c6911a5a4f0b8f0f154763) 6.4.0 - [`24eab2f`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/24eab2f0c9999ffa249dbdec08dd5d977ae86cee) Prevent accidental duplicate recycling of elements when swapping the base element of a component. Fixes #373. - [`76c5ef7`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/76c5ef71b0ad3d33dcbc739f736e3e5f69a8974b) fix lint error - [`8008886`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/8008886b9668474ff676b187582adad207550f83) When swapping the base of a composed child component, update its parent's base reference. Fixes #349. There are 26 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/developit/preact/compare/cf93387f16409d3b34ae55d9c1e82f523c125055...8ca662cd78815209d179cbcb3e22ac027e02df22). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
